query_basis: Programs table rows with verified state program evidence.
Waiver-like program rows or fallback to verified program rows when the state stores waiver entry in the general spine.
Reviewed 2026-06-25 official Wisconsin DHS developmental-disability and children-with-disabilities pages.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official DHS page says Wisconsin has many programs designed to improve the lives of children and adults with developmental and intellectual disabilities.
The same page says adults with developmental and intellectual disabilities should reach out to their local ADRC and that enrollment for adult programs must be done through the local ADRC.

samples.sample_name: Wisconsin DHS children with delays or disabilities page
samples.evidence_snippet: The official children's services page lists programs for children with delays or disabilities including Birth to 3, the Children's Long-Term Support Program, Katie Beckett Medicaid, and CCOP.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 official Wisconsin Birth to 3 program page on dhs.wisconsin.gov.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official page says the Wisconsin Birth to 3 Program is an early intervention special education program that helps children under age 3 who have delays or disabilities.

samples.sample_name: Wisconsin Birth to 3 IDEA Part C statement
samples.evidence_snippet: The same page says this type of program is required by the federal government under Part C of the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act.

samples.sample_name: Wisconsin Birth to 3 local contacts path
samples.evidence_snippet: Under `Find your local Birth to 3 Program`, the official page provides a `Birth to 3 Program contacts` button for local routing.

query_basis: Verified regional education or district pages with special-education routing.

samples.sample_name: Wisconsin Department of Public Instruction Special Education

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 live official Wisconsin DPI School Directory public portal districts page and district-profile leaves.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official DPI page says the School Directory Public Portal is a searchable collection of schools and local education agencies in the state of Wisconsin.

samples.sample_name: Wisconsin School Directory district filters and columns
samples.evidence_snippet: The reviewed public districts page tells families to use one or more filters to search school districts and exposes official `CESA` and `County` filter buttons above a table with `CESA` and `County/Locale` columns.
Reviewed public rows include `Abbotsford (0007)` with `CESA 10` and `Clark`, plus `Adams-Friendship Area (0014)` with `CESA 5` and `Adams`, and the page footer shows `1-5 of 488 items`.
The reviewed Abbotsford district-profile leaf explicitly preserves `County | CESA` as `Clark County | CESA 10` on the official DPI host.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 official Wisconsin DWD DVR home and transition-services pages.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official DVR page says Wisconsin DVR is a federal-state program and that DVR helps people with disabilities find a job, keep a job, or get a better job.
The official transition page says DVR works with high school students who are transitioning from high school to post-secondary education and employment.
The same official page publishes `DVR's Liaisons to Wisconsin Schools` plus liaison lists for the Universities of Wisconsin and Wisconsin Technical Colleges.
The official transition page links the `Policy Guide for Pre-Employment Transition Services` on the same DVR host.

query_basis: Reviewed first-party Disability Rights Wisconsin artifact on disk explicitly preserves Wisconsin statewide disability-rights identity plus a dedicated Protection and Advocacy program on the live first-party domain.

samples.evidence_snippet: Disability Rights Wisconsin is a private non-profit organization that protects the rights of people with disabilities statewide. Programs include Protection and Advocacy.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 live first-party WI FACETS projects, staff, and services pages.

samples.sample_name: WI FACETS statewide PTIC project page
samples.evidence_snippet: The live statewide projects page says Parent Training and Information Center (PTIC) and states that WI FACETS has been funded by the U.S. Department of Education since 2001.
The current staff page says Nelsinia Ramos is Co-Director of the Wisconsin Parent Training and Information Center, which the U.S. Department of Education funds.
The same page says Courtney Salzer serves as Co-Director of the OSEP-funded Wisconsin Parent Training and Information Center (PTI).

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 live first-party Legal Action Wisconsin homepage and about page.

samples.sample_name: Legal Action Wisconsin free legal help homepage route
samples.evidence_snippet: The homepage preserves an Apply for FREE legal help route and statewide service categories including housing, employment, debt and taxes, public benefits, family law, and victim support.
The homepage preserves a current item titled Legal Action of Wisconsin and Judicare Legal Aid Merge, Creating Wisconsin’s Largest Statewide Civil Legal organization.

samples.sample_name: Legal Action Wisconsin LSC support statement
samples.evidence_snippet: The about page states that the website was made possible by generous support of the Legal Services Corporation.

query_basis: Verified ABLE program pages from the program spine.
Reviewed 2026-06-25 live official Wisconsin DHS ADRC contact directory on dhs.wisconsin.gov.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official page tells families to call or visit your local ADRC in person and preserves contact cards with explicit Service area fields.

samples.sample_name: ADRC of Adams County service area
samples.evidence_snippet: The page preserves ADRC of Adams County with Service area Adams County.

samples.sample_name: ADRC of Clark County service area
samples.evidence_snippet: The same directory preserves ADRC of Clark County with Service area Clark County.
The live directory explains that Tribal members may work with a local ADRC or a Tribal ADRS and preserves contact information under each Tribal nation.
